rename_reason: Resolves EXP-407 namespace collision with EXP-407-WIN-052-horizon-analogy-preemption.json. The original SEC-4.2.7a penumbra-scaling content was renamed to EXP-414. Any scanner that finds this stub should redirect to the renamed_to_file path.
note: This tombstone is intentional. Do NOT treat as a real expansion. Do NOT route to decider for integration. Do NOT count as an EXP-407 collision.
